message:
Generate types in predeploy script

Fixes deploy script by generating Cloudflare types before running build.

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 # Vibe Insights
 
-Capture and analyze Amp session transcripts to understand AI coding assistant usage patterns.
+Capture and analyze coding agent session transcripts to understand AI assistant usage patterns.
 
 ## What It Does

@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
     "dev": "bun run cf-typegen && vite dev",
     "build": "vite build && tsc --noEmit",
     "preview": "vite preview",
-    "predeploy": "bun run build",
+    "predeploy": "bun run cf-typegen && bun run build",
     "deploy": "wrangler deploy",
     "cf-typegen": "wrangler types",
     "db:setup": "bun run db:generate && bun run db:migrate:local",
